01 — About Me

The Mind Behind the Machine

I'm Deewakar Bhatia — a 3rd year B.Tech CSE student at Lovely Professional University, Punjab with a CGPA of 7.5. Passionate about data science, algorithms and building production-grade software.

At Edmount India, I designed an integrated Management System connecting Sales, HR, Accounts & Production with automated real-time dashboards. At Edgo Carts, I drove web development and SEO strategy for an EV parts platform.

Beyond academics I grind 150+ DSA problems, hold an Oracle OCI Data Science certification and explore machine learning & deep learning.

Work History

Edmount India
Data Analyst Intern
Sep 2025 – Oct 2025
  • Designed & developed an integrated Management System connecting Sales, HR, Accounts and Production departments.

04 — Projects

Things I've Shipped

Data Science · Power BI↗
Global EV Adoption Trends
Developed an interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing global EV adoption trends and charging infrastructure growth (2010–2035). Includes YoY growth calculation, dynamic KPI tracking, scenario-based forecasting (APS & STEPS) and AI-driven visuals.
Power BIDAXPower QueryStar SchemaData Visualization
01
Data Science · Python↗
MGNREGA Data Analysis
Analyzed the MGNREGA dataset to identify trends in employment generation, budget utilization and workforce demographics across Indian states. Created visualizations covering person-days, wage patterns and participation by gender and social groups.
PythonPandasNumPyMatplotlibSeaborn
02
Python · ML · Computer Vision↗
Traffic Management System
An intelligent traffic management system using computer vision and ML to monitor real-time traffic flow, detect congestion and optimize signal timings. Processes live video feeds to count and classify vehicles and adapt signals based on density.
PythonOpenCVMachine LearningNumPyComputer Vision
03
ML · Flask · Full Stack↗
Movie Recommendation System
Web-based Movie Recommendation System suggesting movies based on content similarity using ML. Implemented TF-IDF Vectorization and Cosine Similarity for filtering. Built Flask backend and integrated TMDB API for live movie posters. Features popular movie recommendations by ratings.
PythonFlaskTF-IDFCosine SimilarityScikit-learnPandasTMDB APIHTML/CSS
